name: image-identifier-lookup
label: Image Identifier Lookup
description: Performs NACCID lookups for DICOM images uploaded to the NACC Data Platform
author: NACC

input_file.description: The DICOM image file for identifier lookup

dry_run.description: Whether to do a dry run

database_mode.description: Whether to lookup identifiers from dev or prod database

naccid_field_name.description: Field name for storing NACCID in subject metadata

event_environment.description: Environment for visit event capture (prod or dev); required for event logging

event_bucket.description: S3 bucket name for event capture; required for event logging

apikey_path_prefix.description: The instance specific AWS parameter gearbot path prefix
